title: paspalum eucomum
intro: Paspalum eucomum, commonly known as the False or Bristly Paspalum, is a tropical grass species native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum eucomum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Paspalum eucomum are typically made by drying and infusing the plant's leaves in hot water, which can then be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
